title: Biking in Moab
summary:
The drive to Ledges campground felt long and scary in the van, with some tight switchbacks you have to make your way down, but we arrived to find our friends Quinn and Caitlin at a nice campground in the canyon. Margaret and Amanda, who were with us at Indian Creek, ended up meeting up with us again for the night and Joe and Caeley joined us the following day, so it was a super fun to have a big group of all of our people. We did a big group bike ride the next day up some fun chunky trails before returning to camp to read under the shade tarp. It's been really nice to meet up with so many of our different friends and we've been enjoying the nightly bonfires which we don't do that much of on our own! We've had some good stargazing in Utah the past couple of weeks.

-Helen
